title: Blue Canyon Flora Waste Bin, Trash Bin for Home, Bathroom, Bedroom or Office, Slim Waste Basket Fits Under Desk/Sink, Indoor Outdoor Double Walled Heavy Plastic Dustbin to Hold Waste, Cream
features: 【 COMPACT DESIGN 】: Blue Canyon’s flora waste bin is made in a round shape with a beautiful engraving design along with an open top. A trash bin is a simple and unique design for every corner of your house. Because of that dustbins can be put inside cupboards, under the kitchen counters, work desks, and a bed.

【 FUNCTIONAL & VERSATILE 】: Floral waste bin has a compact size & designer look that can suit any space. The dust bin can fit in any small and big room, college dorms, condos, offices, etc. Apart from that it can also be used as a toy storage in kids' rooms. This makes blue canyon’s waste bin more practical and cost-effective, which helps support sustainable practices and support to reduce waste.

【 PREMIUM QUALITY 】: Flexible trash bin is easy to move as our bins are made of plastic. The double-walled, heavy plastic bin, is enhanced by its attractive outer pattern and provides durability. Blue Canyon’s tough and stable plastic material made the waste bins more affordable than others, due to that the plastic bins are stronger than other types of waste bins. This makes them a reliable and long-lasting waste disposal option for all purposes.

【 ENHANCE DECOR 】: Blue Canyon’s crafted stylish bins complement almost any bathroom, office, kitchen, bedroom, outdoor area, etc. As waste bin comes in a five-color variant. We kept in mind hygiene, and a modern & aesthetic design while designing the bins. So, with the help of a dump cloth, you can clean the bin.

【 WASTE BIN CRAFTED TO SUIT YOUR NEED 】: Our waste bin helps to keep your rooms around the office, home, and hostel clean. Blue Canyon’s dustbin is lightweight compared to other bins, this makes them ideal for use in areas where waste collection is frequent or space is limited. Waste bin helps to prevent environmental hazards and will give a neat and tidy place.
